commit.message:
Add webservice:call command for REST API calls

Calls Moodle webservice functions via the REST protocol. Supports JSON
and XML response formats, GET and POST methods, pretty-printed output,
and flexible parameter passing (key=value pairs or raw query strings).

Enhancements over moosh1: JSON/XML format selection, pretty-print,
POST support, error detection in JSON responses, Config bootstrap level
(lighter than Full).

feat: sbx sandbox sessions, embedded terminal, settings redesign, and UX improvements

Sandbox sessions (sbx):
- Sandbox agents (claude, codex, gemini, etc.) now run via `sbx run` instead of docker agent API
- Embedded xterm.js terminal in conversation view renders sbx TUI output natively
- PTY setup via python3 pty.spawn() for proper controlling terminal (fixes sbx TTY detection)
- Docker login device-code flow shown inline in Settings (no terminal needed)
- Debug panel in sandbox sessions: command, exit code, env var status

Settings redesign (5 clean tabs):
- General: launch at login, appearance, hotkey, terminal emulator, show in dock option
- Agent: default agent picker (incl. sbx agents), config file, agents folder, poll interval
- Sessions: sessions folder, recent dirs list, server status/port
- Docker: account card, sbx auth + sandbox mode, binary download, debug toggle
- About: version, links

Session management:
- Multi-select with Shift+click (range) and Cmd+click (toggle) in conversation sidebar
- Backspace deletes selected sessions with confirmation
- Delete button in title bar and sidebar context menu
- Empty state with New Session CTA when no sessions exist

Quick Entry:
- Directory picker dropdown: default path, recent dirs, Browse option
- Sandbox agents launch sbx in embedded terminal instead of opening system terminal
- Working dir saved to recents on session creation

Other:
- Stable session list merge (no UI jumping on poll)
- Session polling every N seconds (configurable)
- Show in Dock when windows open, hide when all closed
- Spotlight CTA items (Ask Oscar, New Session) with app icon thumbnail
- `sbx` binary download from docker/sbx-releases with system/downloaded picker

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: rename InitPlan to Plan, consolidate constants (#43)

* refactor: remove S3 params from genesis tasks, wire env vars to sidecar

- Remove S3 bucket/prefix/region from all genesis task params
  (ConfigureGenesis, UploadArtifacts, AssembleGenesis, SetGenesisPeers,
  CollectAndSetPeers). The sidecar derives these from its environment.
- Inject SEI_GENESIS_BUCKET and SEI_GENESIS_REGION into sidecar
  container env (both StatefulSet and bootstrap Job pod specs).
- Remove genesisS3Config and groupGenesisS3 — no longer needed.
- Remove spec.genesis.s3 injection on child nodes from nodegroup
  controller — the sidecar resolves genesis by chainId alone.
- Add Platform config to SeiNodeGroupReconciler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: address code quality review — remove dead code, fix bugs, clean up API

P0 fixes:
- Remove dead parseS3URI, sidecarRequestDuration metric, NormalizeRoute/
  NormalizeStatusCode, ErrTaskNotFound, AwaitConditionParams
- Remove stale SeiNodePool references from comments

P1 fixes:
- Remove GenesisConfiguration, GenesisPVCSource, GenesisS3Source types
  and hasGenesisPVC code path (no existing nodes — safe breaking change)
- Fix templateHash to include chainId and entrypoint (was only hashing images)
- Add e.complete() to teardownBootstrapExecution.Execute on success
- Log error instead of silently swallowing marshalOverrides failure
- Emit warning event for PhaseFailed nodes with recovery guidance
- Simplify nodeMode() to direct switch instead of creating throwaway planner
- Use optimistic lock on nodegroup status patches (was non-optimistic)

P2 fixes:
- Remove unused net/url import
- Remove dead parseS3URI and genesis PVC tests
- Rename test using removed GenesisNode concept
- Fix unused fmt import in bootstrap.go
- Regenerated CRDs and deepcopy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: address PR review comments, fix lint

- Revert generateSeiNode to plain function (no reconciler fields used)
- Remove Platform field from SeiNodeGroupReconciler (unused after
  genesis S3 config removal)
- Fix gofmt formatting issues
- Fix deprecated result.Requeue usage (use RequeueAfter only)
- Clean up test helper to call generateSeiNode directly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename InitPlan to Plan on SeiNodeStatus

The plan field is not limited to initialization — it will support
update plans, deployment plans, and other reconciliation tasks.
Rename to reflect this broader purpose.

- SeiNodeStatus.InitPlan → SeiNodeStatus.Plan (json: "plan")
- buildGenesisInitPlan → buildGenesisPlan
- Updated all references, comments, and docs
- Regenerated CRDs and deepcopy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: condense profile hero — less wasted vertical space

- Smaller avatar (20/24 instead of 28/32)
- Single horizontal row layout instead of stacked

- Badges + share buttons on same line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hardcoded white/blue colors that broke dark themes

Files browser folders, user role badges, and kit pricing formula box
were using hardcoded light-mode colors. Replaced with CSS variables
(--card-bg, --blue-light, --blue-mid) so they follow the active theme.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add image proxy edge function to fix share capture on mobile

Fetching R2 images directly from the browser fails on mobile due to CORS
restrictions and user gesture timeouts with navigator.share. The proxy
edge function fetches images server-side (no CORS) and re-serves them
with permissive headers, making html-to-image capture reliable on all devices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove duplicate About heading on profile page

redesign: premium profile page overhaul

Hero:
- Rounded-2xl avatar with green status dot instead of circular
- Radial gradient backdrop instead of linear
- RTS score in bordered card container
- Compact badge row with rounded-lg pills
- Cleaner typography hierarchy, reduced visual noise
- Border-bottom separator from content

Stats:
- Single unified card with divide-x columns (LinkedIn-style)
- Cleaner than individual cards, more professional
- Responsive text sizing

Layout:
- Who Viewed checks auth ownership via useAuth
- Network size from real DB data
- Endorsement count shown in section header
- Removed RCS mini breakdown from hero (too noisy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix missing actor info in workspace.invitation_revoked audit log (#23)

The revokeInvitationAction resolved the authenticated userId but did not
pass it through to the revokeInvitation internal mutation, resulting in
audit log entries with no actor. Now the action extracts actor info
(actorId, actorName, actorAvatarUrl) from the user identity and passes
it to the mutation, which includes it in the insertAuditLogDirect call.

Closes BUN-99

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(accounts): LevelSerializer read_only_fields and test_create_level assertion

Remove 'teacher' from read_only_fields; add extra_kwargs required=False and
override get_validators() to drop UniqueTogetherValidator (teacher is injected
by perform_create, so DRF-level uniqueness check must not demand it in body).
Add teacher ownership assertion to test_create_level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Skip pending transactions during Powens sync to prevent duplicates

Powens assigns different IDs to pending vs settled versions of the same
transaction, causing duplicates in our DB. We now filter out pending
transactions during sync and wait for the settled version instead.

- Filter out coming=true transactions in syncTransactionsFromWebhook and backfillTransactions
- Hardcode coming: false since we only sync settled transactions
- Fix pagination to use unfiltered count to avoid stopping early
- Remove status filter (pending/completed) from transaction filters UI
- Remove pending badge from transaction list and detail sheet
- Clean up related i18n keys (en/fr) and tests
- Add deleteAllPending migration to clean up existing pending transactions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(accounts): add Level model and CRUD endpoint

Adds Level model with teacher-scoped CRUD via /api/levels/. Fixes
DynamicCORSMiddleware to allow non-browser API clients (Authorization
header present) so test suite can authenticate without an Origin header.

commit.message:
feat: admin car edit, user profile add car, total_spent fix, and perf improvements

- Add PUT /admin/cars/:slug endpoint for editing car details (with duplicate check)
- Parallelize getUser DB queries with Promise.all (5 sequential → 1+4 parallel)
- Fix total_spent returning kobo instead of naira in user profile stats
- Wire adminUpdateCar handler using existing sanitizeCarInput + buildUpdateData utils

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add cache commands: purge, rebuild, info, create, mod

Consolidates moosh1's 9 cache commands into 5 well-designed moosh2
commands:

cache:purge — purge all caches, a specific store, or a specific
definition. Replaces cache-clear and cache-store-clear.

cache:rebuild — rebuild course cache for one or all courses. Replaces
cache-course-rebuild.

cache:info — display cache configuration (stores, definitions, mappings,
locks) with table/csv/json output. Replaces cache-config-get.

cache:create — create cache store instances for redis, memcached, apcu,
or file backends. Consolidates cache-add-mem-store and
cache-add-redis-store.

cache:mod — modify cache mode mappings or definition-to-store mappings.
Consolidates cache-edit-mappings and cache-set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add 60s grace period before ending recording and rejoin ongoing calls

Two bugs caused the Accounting Talk recording (1h25m) to only capture
the first 15 minutes on 2026-03-31:

1. The recorder exited immediately when participants briefly disconnected
   and reconnected (a ~7 second gap). Now requires 6 consecutive "empty"
   checks (60s) before declaring a call ended.

2. After handle_call finished, the room token stayed in the monitor's
   active set, so the still-ongoing call was never re-detected. Now
   clear_token() is called after each handle_call, allowing the bot to
   rejoin if the call continues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix share card image capture on mobile Safari

Resetting img.src before setting the data URL forces img.complete to
re-evaluate, preventing the onload wait from being skipped prematurely.
A double requestAnimationFrame after all images load ensures the browser
has painted before html-to-image captures the card.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enrich narratives with career, streak, series, conference, and rivalry context (#229)

* Enrich narratives with career context, win/loss streak, series, conference, and rivalry

Add five new context dimensions to player and team narrative generation:
- Career context: class year + previous school (transfer vs. HS) from players.json
- Team win/loss streak: computed from recent game results (3+ triggers inclusion)
- Series context: detects weekend series (swept, took/dropped, split) within 6-day window
- Conference game flag: fuzzy-matches opponent against same-conference schools
- Rivalry game flag: curated lookup table of ~50 major college baseball rivalries

Implementation:
- _extract_recent_results(): aggregates last 10 team results from player game logs
- compute_narrative_context(): computes streak/series/conference/rivalry from recent_results
- _format_career_context(): formats yr + hs into prose (e.g. "Sr. transfer from Chipola College")
- Persists recent_results array in stats/*.json for use by refresh_narratives.py
- Both generate_narrative_claude() and generate_team_narrative_claude() accept new narrative_ctx
- Updated system prompts with weaving rules for new context types
- All new parameters are optional with defaults — existing callers unaffected

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QVycQX3fwHxUDEGUmWFc5K

* Bump narrative limits: player 50-85 words/280 tokens, team 60-100 words/350 tokens/650 chars

Gives the model breathing room to weave in the new context dimensions
(career, streak, series, conference, rivalry) without dropping useful
game or season details. The model naturally stays shorter when context
is thin.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QVycQX3fwHxUDEGUmWFc5K

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 2: Production-grade clinical document system with AI chat, template learning, and evidence orchestration

Major additions:
- AI chat interface (intent parsing, doc composition, natural language generation)
- Template learning system (document ingestion, pattern extraction, consistency scoring)
- Profile-guided generation (matches existing SOZO document structure)
- Evidence orchestration engine (query planning, dedup, ranking, clustering, contradictions, snapshots)
- Clinical QA engine with 24 rules (BLOCK/WARNING/INFO severity)
- Claim traceability (section → evidence bundle → PMID chain)
- Reviewer workflow (DRAFT → NEEDS_REVIEW → APPROVED → EXPORTED)
- Batch generation with build manifests and content hashing
- Visual generation upgrade (figure manifests, deterministic templates)
- Template-driven generation from uploaded DOCX files
- Document merging (combine multiple doc types into one)
- 8 Gold Standard DOCX templates
- Learned master profile from 225 existing documents
- 304 passing tests across 17 test files

Safety guarantees:
- AI never generates clinical content — only parses intent and routes to verified pipeline
- All clinical data from pre-verified ConditionSchema with real PMIDs
- Insufficient evidence explicitly marked, never fabricated
- QA blocks export for missing safety data, placeholders, or empty references

fix: rebalance Referral Trust Score to total 100 points

Old weighting totaled 115+ with mismatched maxes (50/45 bug).

New weighting (100 total):
- Profile Completeness: 35 (Tour=3, Bio=5, Photo=5, Video=7, License=5, Territory=3, Social=3, Career=4)
- Network Activity: 15 (3 pts per partner)
- Communication: 15 (based on messages sent)
- Referral Activity: 20 (5 pts each — core action gets highest weight)
- Reputation: 10 (endorsements/vouches)
- New Member Bonus: 5 (decays over 30 days)

Also fixed: partnership query used wrong column names (agent_a/agent_b
instead of requesting_agent_id/receiving_agent_id), tips reflect new
point values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix seamless: proper edge-to-edge blend at 15% instead of wrap-around

The previous approach blended edge pixels with center content via
half-image offset, causing visible ghosting. This version correctly
blends left↔right and top↔bottom edge counterparts so both sides
of the seam converge to the same value. 15% blend zone with cosine
falloff, single-pass corner handling with diagonal blending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: AprsRepositryImplの不要なMutexを除去し設計ミスを修正

aprs-messageクレートはread_packet用(rx)とset_filter用(worker)に
別々のMutexを持ち、並行アクセスを適切に処理する設計になっている。
AprsRepositryImplがAprsIS全体をArc<Mutex<>>で包んでいたため、
read_packet待機中にset_buddy_listが永久にロック待ちになっていた。

- Arc<Mutex<AprsIS>> → Arc<AprsIS> に変更
- 不要なaprs_host/user/password フィールドを削除
  (再接続はaprs-message内部のreconnect_loopが処理)
- 手動再接続ロジックを削除

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
